name: Roper Technologies
analysis: ROP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $340.2500, stop $316.9089, target $374.6050 (1.47:1) — then trail it.
